title: australopyrum retrofractum
intro: Australopyrum retrofractum, also known as the Chinese angelica tree, is a plant species native to China, characterized by its unique, twisted roots. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Australopyrum retrofractum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and improve circulation, as well as its potential to prevent and treat various diseases such as hypertension and cancer. In terms of herbal preparations, the plant's roots can be dried, sliced, and then used to make teas, decoctions, or infusions for medicinal purposes.
